title: EdTech and Learning
description: Acquisition and positioning for education products that need to reach learners, schools, teams, or parents with a clearer reason to act.
buyerProblem: Education buyers are busy, budget-aware, and skeptical of vague transformation language.
usefulWhen: Your value is strong but the offer is too broad
You need to connect product use to a measurable learning or business outcome
Your acquisition channels are producing traffic without enough qualified intent
growthSystem: Conversion points built around learner or buyer intent
proof: LessonsUp case study: sharper acquisition for education
Training and speaking experience across universities and accelerators
